content.situation: 培训结束时，HR向你表示感谢并祝你未来顺利，你需要礼貌回应并表达感谢
content.speakerText: Thanks for your participation today—we really appreciate your engagement!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你今天的参与，我们非常欣赏你的积极投入！

blanks.answer: I really enjoyed it and look forward to applying what I've learned.
options: I really enjoyed it and look forward to applying what I've learned.
I will call you if I need help.
It was not that hard, thanks.

content.hint: 回应感谢时，应表达感激并积极展望未来，避免使用消极或模糊表达。
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌道别中的感恩与积极反馈表达

content.situation: 你和一位同事在培训结束后准备离开，对方说再见，你需要自然回应并表达友好
content.speakerText: Well, I guess this is it! Have a great one!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，今天就到这里了！祝你一切顺利！

blanks.answer: It was great learning with you.
options: It was great learning with you.
I hope you get promoted soon.

content.hint: 在职场道别时，用正面、温暖的表达收尾能建立良好关系，避免过于随意或个人化。
content.knowledgePoint: 职场友好道别中的正面互动表达

content.situation: 培训主管在结束时鼓励你保持联系，你需要礼貌回应并表达感谢
content.speakerText: Don’t hesitate to reach out if you have questions going forward.
content.speakerTextCn: 以后有任何问题，随时联系我。

blanks.answer: I’ll definitely keep you in mind.
options: I’ll definitely keep you in mind.
I don’t think I’ll need help.
Can I text you after work?
You’re too kind, but I’m fine.

content.hint: 当对方提供支持时，回应应体现开放态度和感激之情，避免直接拒绝或过度承诺。
content.knowledgePoint: 接受支持提议时的礼貌回应结构
